ddls:
CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the member */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the member */,
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the party the member belongs to */,
  "chamber" TEXT /* Chamber the member serves in (e.g., house, senate) */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the member represents */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District the member represents */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the member */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the member */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website of the member */,
  "joined_date" TEXT /* Date the member joined the legislative body */,
  "left_date" TEXT /* Date the member left the legislative body */,
  "dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the member */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the member */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Biography of the member */,
  "photo_url" TEXT /* URL of the member's photo */,
  "twitter_url" TEXT /* URL of the member's Twitter profile */,
  "facebook_url" TEXT /* URL of the member's Facebook profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "parties" (
  "party_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each party */,
  "party_name" TEXT /* Name of the party */,
  "ideology" TEXT /* Ideological stance of the party */,
  "leader_id" TEXT /* ID of the leader of the party */,
  "formation_date" TEXT /* Date the party was formed */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the party */,
  "twitter_url" TEXT /* URL of the party's Twitter profile */,
  "facebook_url" TEXT /* URL of the party's Facebook profile */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL of the party's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("party_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "congress_number" INTEGER /* Number of the Congress (e.g., 113, 114) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the session */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the session */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast during the session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Name of the session */,
  "total_bills_introduced" INTEGER /* Total number of bills introduced during the session */,
  "total_bills_passed" INTEGER /* Total number of bills passed during the session */,
  "session_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the session's key activities and outcomes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "votes" (
  "vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vote */,
  "member_id" TEXT /* ID of the member casting the vote */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the vote is part of */,
  "vote_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was cast */,
  "vote_type" TEXT /* Type of vote (e.g., roll call, voice vote) */,
  "vote_result" TEXT /* Result of the vote (e.g., yea, nay, present) */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the vote is related to */,
  "bill_title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "bill_url" TEXT /* URL to the bill's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES legislation ("legislation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_votes_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "missed_votes" (
  "missed_vote_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each missed vote */,
  "member_id" TEXT /* ID of the member who missed the vote */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session the missed vote is part of */,
  "missed_date" TEXT /* Date the vote was missed */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for missing the vote (e.g., illness, travel) */,
  "bill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bill the missed vote is related to */,
  "bill_title" TEXT /* Title of the bill */,
  "bill_url" TEXT /* URL to the bill's details */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("missed_vote_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missed_votes_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missed_votes_bill_id FOREIGN KEY ("bill_id") REFERENCES legislation ("legislation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_missed_votes_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "member_id" TEXT /* ID of the member */,
  "session_id" INTEGER /* ID of the session */,
  "missed_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes missed by the member */,
  "total_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast by the member */,
  "votes_with_party_pct" REAL /* Percentage of votes cast in line with the party's stance */,
  "total_bills_sponsored" INTEGER /* Total number of bills sponsored by the member */,
  "total_bills_co_sponsored" INTEGER /* Total number of bills co-sponsored by the member */,
  "attendance_rate" REAL /* Attendance rate of the member (percentage of sessions attended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_session_id FOREIGN KEY ("session_id") REFERENCES sessions ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "constituencies" (
  "constituency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each constituency */,
  "state" TEXT /* State the constituency is in */,
  "district" INTEGER /* District number of the constituency */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the constituency */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the constituency */,
  "key_issues" TEXT /* Key issues affecting the constituency */,
  "city" TEXT /* Main city in the constituency */,
  "county" TEXT /* County the constituency is in */,
  "demographic_data" TEXT /* Detailed demographic data */,
  "economic_indicators" TEXT /* Economic data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("constituency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituencies_state FOREIGN KEY ("state") REFERENCES members ("state"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_constituencies_district FOREIGN KEY ("district") REFERENCES members ("district")
)

CREATE TABLE "committee_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee assignment */,
  "member_id" TEXT /* ID of the member */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the member in the committee */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the assignment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the assignment */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the member in the committee */,
  "subcommittee_ids" TEXT /* IDs of subcommittees the member is assigned to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_assignments_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_committee_assignments_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "committees" (
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each committee */,
  "committee_name" TEXT /* Name of the committee */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the committee's responsibilities */,
  "chair_id" TEXT /* ID of the committee chair */,
  "subcommittee_names" TEXT /* Names of subcommittees under the committee */,
  "committee_url" TEXT /* URL to the committee's official page */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislation" (
  "legislation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of legislation */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the legislation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the legislation */,
  "introduced_date" TEXT /* Date the legislation was introduced */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the legislation (e.g., pending, passed, vetoed) */,
  "sponsor_id" TEXT /* ID of the primary sponsor of the legislation */,
  "co_sponsor_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the co-sponsors of the legislation */,
  "bill_text" TEXT /* Full text of the bill */,
  "bill_url" TEXT /* URL to the bill's details */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee that handled the bill */,
  "sponsor_party_id" INTEGER /* ID of the party of the bill's sponsor */,
  "co_sponsor_party_ids" TEXT /* IDs of the parties of the bill's co-sponsors */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("legislation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislation_sponsor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislation_sponsor_party_id FOREIGN KEY ("sponsor_party_id") REFERENCES parties ("party_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislation_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "member_id" TEXT /* ID of the member whose profile was accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the profile was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the profile */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_access_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "internal_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., performance, legislative) */,
  "generated_by" TEXT /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "report_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report's key findings */,
  "report_audience" TEXT /* Intended audience of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_internal_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "user_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_location" TEXT /* Location of the user accessing the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "legislative_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each legislative history entry */,
  "legislation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the legislation */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the legislation */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the change */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  "bill_url" TEXT /* URL to the bill's details for each version */,
  "committee_id" INTEGER /* ID of the committee that handled the bill at each version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_history_legislation_id FOREIGN KEY ("legislation_id") REFERENCES legislation ("legislation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_legislative_history_committee_id FOREIGN KEY ("committee_id") REFERENCES committees ("committee_id")
)
